TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Katop, title = Katop, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Katop} }

S.FORM: == Katop == O tatapangan a lengaw itiniay i Filipin, Inni ato ka'amisan, Sawalian ato satimolan no Taywan, itini i Fotod iraay a molengaw. Tata'angay ,takaraw a mo'ecel ko tapang no kilang,masasifoday ko lamit i tatapangan,makorahay a koheting ko tolak.o ca'ang ko'engelay kohera a kahengang to mamang,ira ko mahapinangay a konis no papah.masanofita'olay ko a faco no papah a matatamay miketing i ca'ang, cifanohay ko tafedo' a papah,ma'ikes to i,marasrasay kina fanoh no papah. O ta'edaw no papah ira ko 10~17cm, dadahal no papah ira ko 5~8cm.itiraay i kakiri'an no papah a cifalo, 'enemay ko pangpang no falo, kakahad no falo ira ko 1cm, fanohongay.o heci matamosolay matiyaay o tamosolay-mali.o kakaya' no heci ira ko 3.5~4.5cm, o kakahad no heci ira ko 1~2cm, ilaloma' no heci ira ko 1~3 a masatoriyaday a pa'eno. Konian heci kohetingay ifati'ian koheraay ko cengel. I kacangalahan ko kacifaloan, i karafawfawaan ko kacihecian. Piraoy no Finacadan Malenakay i pa'eneray a tongroh no riyar, cowa kacifao, Tata'angay ,takaraw a mo'ecel, masamihecaan ko kalangdaw orasaka, malopatih I salawacan no riyar mitaker to fali.O tahapinangan no Kbalan a finacadan. Adihay heca mapaloma i lawac no lalan, taliyok no loma', o heci manga'ay a kaenen. Ma'edengan ko kako'esit ko tapang no kilang, orasaka, tada matatodongay sapisanga' to dafong no loma', o Tao-finacadan itini i Fotod o sapisanga' to tamina, o tolak o sapicengel to salil, o heci kahemaway o hasa pawpaw.Ira ko cinganganay tonini a ngasaw no 'Amis o Cikatopay hananay, yo herek no lalood I Cepo' I 1878 mihecaan maliposak oasitimol maro' i Tapowaray,Makerahay,Ciwkangan, Sa'aniwan ato Madawdaw. == Pacefaday a Tilid ==
S.PHON: == kato~up == o~u tatapaŋan a ɾəŋaw itiniaj i fiɾipin, inni ato~u kaʡamisan, sawaɾian ato~u satimo~uɾan no~u tajwan, itini i fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ iraaj a mo~uɾəŋaw. tataʡaŋaj ,takaraw a mo~uʡəʦəɾ ko~u tapaŋ no~u kiɾaŋ,masasifo~uɬ~ɮaj ko~u ɾamit i tatapaŋan,mako~uraħaj a ko~uħətiŋ ko~u to~uɾak.o~u ʦaʡaŋ ko~uʡəŋəɾaj ko~uħəra a kaħəŋaŋ to~u mamaŋ,ira ko~u maħapinaŋaj a ko~unis no~u papaħ.masano~ufitaʡo~uɾaj ko~u a faʦo~u no~u papaħ a matatamaj mikətiŋ i ʦaʡaŋ, ʦifano~uħaj ko~u tafəɬ~ɮo~uʡ a papaħ,maʡikəs to~u i,marasrasaj kina fano~uħ no~u papaħ. o~u taʡəɬ~ɮaw no~u papaħ ira ko~u **~**ʦm, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ no~u papaħ ira ko~u *~*ʦm.itiraaj i kakiriʡan no~u papaħ a ʦifaɾo~u, ʡənəmaj ko~u paŋpaŋ no~u faɾo~u, kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u faɾo~u ira ko~u *ʦm, fano~uħo~uŋaj.o~u ħəʦi matamo~uso~uɾaj matijaaj o~u tamo~uso~uɾaj-maɾi.o~u kakajaʡ no~u ħəʦi ira ko~u *.*~*.*ʦm, o~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u ħəʦi ira ko~u *~*ʦm, iɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u ħəʦi ira ko~u *~* a masato~urijaɬ~ɮaj a paʡəno~u. ko~unian ħəʦi ko~uħətiŋaj ifatiʡian ko~uħəraaj ko~u ʦəŋəɾ. i kaʦaŋaɾaħan ko~u kaʦifaɾo~uan, i karafawfawaan ko~u kaʦiħəʦian. pirao~uj no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan maɾənakaj i paʡənəraj a to~uŋro~uħ no~u rijar, ʦo~uwa kaʦifao~u, tataʡaŋaj ,takaraw a mo~uʡəʦəɾ, masamiħəʦaan ko~u kaɾaŋɬ~ɮaw o~urasaka, maɾo~upatiħ i saɾawaʦan no~u rijar mitakər to~u faɾi.o~u taħapinaŋan no~u kb~b~vaɾan a finaʦaɬ~ɮan. aɬ~ɮiħaj ħəʦa mapaɾo~uma i ɾawaʦ no~u ɾaɾan, taɾijo~uk no~u ɾo~umaʡ, o~u ħəʦi maŋaʡaj a kaənən. maʡəɬ~ɮəŋan ko~u kako~uʡəsit ko~u tapaŋ no~u kiɾaŋ, o~urasaka, taɬ~ɮa matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj sapisaŋaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, o~u tao~u-finaʦaɬ~ɮan itini i fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ o~u sapisaŋaʡ to~u tamina, o~u to~uɾak o~u sapiʦəŋəɾ to~u saɾiɾ, o~u ħəʦi kaħəmawaj o~u ħasa pawpaw.ira ko~u ʦiŋaŋanaj to~unini a ŋasaw no~u ʡamis o~u ʦikato~upaj ħananaj, jo~u ħərək no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦəpo~uʡ i **** miħəʦaan maɾipo~usak o~uasitimo~uɾ maro~uʡ i tapo~uwaraj,makəraħaj,ʦiwkaŋan, saʡaniwan ato~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw. == paʦəfaɬ~ɮaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ==
S.FORM: == Katop == O tatapangan a lengaw itiniay i Filipin, Inni ato ka'amisan, Sawalian ato satimolan no Taywan, itini i Fotod iraay a molengaw. Tata'angay ,takaraw a mo'ecel ko tapang no kilang,masasifoday ko lamit i tatapangan,makorahay a koheting ko tolak.o ca'ang ko'engelay kohera a kahengang to mamang,ira ko mahapinangay a konis no papah.masanofita'olay ko a faco no papah a matatamay miketing i ca'ang, cifanohay ko tafedo' a papah,ma'ikes to i,marasrasay kina fanoh no papah. O ta'edaw no papah ira ko 10~17cm, dadahal no papah ira ko 5~8cm.itiraay i kakiri'an no papah a cifalo, 'enemay ko pangpang no falo, kakahad no falo ira ko 1cm, fanohongay.o heci matamosolay matiyaay o tamosolay-mali.o kakaya' no heci ira ko 3.5~4.5cm, o kakahad no heci ira ko 1~2cm, ilaloma' no heci ira ko 1~3 a masatoriyaday a pa'eno. Konian heci kohetingay ifati'ian koheraay ko cengel. I kacangalahan ko kacifaloan, i karafawfawaan ko kacihecian. Piraoy no Finacadan Malenakay i pa'eneray a tongroh no riyar, cowa kacifao, Tata'angay ,takaraw a mo'ecel, masamihecaan ko kalangdaw orasaka, malopatih I salawacan no riyar mitaker to fali.O tahapinangan no Kbalan a finacadan. Adihay heca mapaloma i lawac no lalan, taliyok no loma', o heci manga'ay a kaenen. Ma'edengan ko kako'esit ko tapang no kilang, orasaka, tada matatodongay sapisanga' to dafong no loma', o Tao-finacadan itini i Fotod o sapisanga' to tamina, o tolak o sapicengel to salil, o heci kahemaway o hasa pawpaw.Ira ko cinganganay tonini a ngasaw no 'Amis o Cikatopay hananay, yo herek no lalood I Cepo' I 1878 mihecaan maliposak oasitimol maro' i Tapowaray,Makerahay,Ciwkangan, Sa'aniwan ato Madawdaw. == Pacefaday a Tilid ==
S.PHON: == kato~up == o~u tatapaŋan a ɾəŋaw itiniaj i fiɾipin, inni ato~u kaʡamisan, sawaɾian ato~u satimo~uɾan no~u tajwan, itini i fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ iraaj a mo~uɾəŋaw. tataʡaŋaj ,takaraw a mo~uʡəʦəɾ ko~u tapaŋ no~u kiɾaŋ,masasifo~uɬ~ɮaj ko~u ɾamit i tatapaŋan,mako~uraħaj a ko~uħətiŋ ko~u to~uɾak.o~u ʦaʡaŋ ko~uʡəŋəɾaj ko~uħəra a kaħəŋaŋ to~u mamaŋ,ira ko~u maħapinaŋaj a ko~unis no~u papaħ.masano~ufitaʡo~uɾaj ko~u a faʦo~u no~u papaħ a matatamaj mikətiŋ i ʦaʡaŋ, ʦifano~uħaj ko~u tafəɬ~ɮo~uʡ a papaħ,maʡikəs to~u i,marasrasaj kina fano~uħ no~u papaħ. o~u taʡəɬ~ɮaw no~u papaħ ira ko~u **~**ʦm, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ no~u papaħ ira ko~u *~*ʦm.itiraaj i kakiriʡan no~u papaħ a ʦifaɾo~u, ʡənəmaj ko~u paŋpaŋ no~u faɾo~u, kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u faɾo~u ira ko~u *ʦm, fano~uħo~uŋaj.o~u ħəʦi matamo~uso~uɾaj matijaaj o~u tamo~uso~uɾaj-maɾi.o~u kakajaʡ no~u ħəʦi ira ko~u *.*~*.*ʦm, o~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u ħəʦi ira ko~u *~*ʦm, iɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u ħəʦi ira ko~u *~* a masato~urijaɬ~ɮaj a paʡəno~u. ko~unian ħəʦi ko~uħətiŋaj ifatiʡian ko~uħəraaj ko~u ʦəŋəɾ. i kaʦaŋaɾaħan ko~u kaʦifaɾo~uan, i karafawfawaan ko~u kaʦiħəʦian. pirao~uj no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan maɾənakaj i paʡənəraj a to~uŋro~uħ no~u rijar, ʦo~uwa kaʦifao~u, tataʡaŋaj ,takaraw a mo~uʡəʦəɾ, masamiħəʦaan ko~u kaɾaŋɬ~ɮaw o~urasaka, maɾo~upatiħ i saɾawaʦan no~u rijar mitakər to~u faɾi.o~u taħapinaŋan no~u kb~b~vaɾan a finaʦaɬ~ɮan. aɬ~ɮiħaj ħəʦa mapaɾo~uma i ɾawaʦ no~u ɾaɾan, taɾijo~uk no~u ɾo~umaʡ, o~u ħəʦi maŋaʡaj a kaənən. maʡəɬ~ɮəŋan ko~u kako~uʡəsit ko~u tapaŋ no~u kiɾaŋ, o~urasaka, taɬ~ɮa matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj sapisaŋaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, o~u tao~u-finaʦaɬ~ɮan itini i fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ o~u sapisaŋaʡ to~u tamina, o~u to~uɾak o~u sapiʦəŋəɾ to~u saɾiɾ, o~u ħəʦi kaħəmawaj o~u ħasa pawpaw.ira ko~u ʦiŋaŋanaj to~unini a ŋasaw no~u ʡamis o~u ʦikato~upaj ħananaj, jo~u ħərək no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦəpo~uʡ i **** miħəʦaan maɾipo~usak o~uasitimo~uɾ maro~uʡ i tapo~uwaraj,makəraħaj,ʦiwkaŋan, saʡaniwan ato~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw. == paʦəfaɬ~ɮaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ==
